evals.name: basic-distillation
evals.prompt: Summarize today's reports into a new distillation document.
evals.expected_output: A file in reports/distillations/ following the distillation_v1.md template, synthesizing insights from existing reports.

evals.name: empty-day
evals.prompt: Run daily distillation for a day with no reports.
evals.expected_output: A message informing the user that no reports were found for today.
